title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Intel India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Intel India
jsonLd.description:
Intel India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Intel India:
Intel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India!
